title: 2016 Federal Subsistence Regional Advisory Council Nominations Open
summary: The 2016 Federal Subsistence Regional Advisory Council (RAC) nomination period is now open. RAC members serve three-year terms. The closing period is January 29, 2016. Nomination Packet Please contact Ms.Coble by any of the means listed below. She will be happy to ship, email or fax the information...

title: Community Subsistence Hunt Update
summary: Information from Community Subsistence Hunt (CSH) hotline 822-6789 – August 21, 2015.
